keyEvents.text: Goal! Trinidad and Tobago 1, Bermuda 0. Kobi Henry (Trinidad and Tobago) header from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Noah Powder with a cross following a set piece situation.

Second Half begins Trinidad and Tobago 1, Bermuda 0.

Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Wayne Frederick replaces Real Gill.
